scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kapter/contracts build && pnpm --filter backend-api build && pnpm --filter dashboard build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter backend-api lint && pnpm --filter mobile-app lint && pnpm --filter dashboard lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @kapter/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter mobile-app exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false && pnpm --filter dashboard typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
